transcript:
[Meeting date: 2026-06-29]
[00:00] You: Hiring planning — we need to finalize our offer timeline for the two finalists.
[00:40] Speaker 1: I'm recommending we extend offers to both candidates by end of this week — so by July 3rd.
[01:15] Speaker 2: The background checks take 5 to 7 business days. So if we extend offers July 3rd, checks come back by around July 13th.
[01:55] Speaker 3: Once background checks clear, they can start. Their requested start dates are August 3rd for Candidate A and August 17th for Candidate B.
[02:35] You: Good. When does Candidate B's non-compete expire?
[02:50] Speaker 3: Candidate B's non-compete expires August 1st. Starting August 17th is safe.
[03:20] Speaker 1: We should send them the onboarding materials a week before start — so by July 27th for Candidate A.
[03:50] Speaker 2: I'll set up their equipment orders this week. Lead time is usually 10 business days, so ordering by July 3rd means equipment arrives around July 17th.
[04:25] You: Good planning. The 30-day performance check-ins will be September 3rd and September 17th respectively. I'll put those on my calendar.
[04:55] Speaker 3: And the 90-day reviews are November 2nd and November 16th. We should schedule those soon.
[05:20] You: We also need to finalize benefits enrollment before their first day. Open enrollment closes the last day of their first week — I don't have the exact date for Candidate B yet.

action_items.description: Extend job offers to both finalists
action_items.source_quote: I'm recommending we extend offers to both candidates by end of this week — so by July 3rd.
I'll set up their equipment orders this week.

action_items.description: Send onboarding materials to Candidate A one week before start date
action_items.source_quote: We should send them the onboarding materials a week before start — so by July 27th for Candidate A.

decisions: Candidate B start date: August 17th (non-compete expires August 1st)

dates.description: Benefits enrollment deadline for Candidate B
dates.raw_deadline_text: last day of their first week
